text:
Created attachment 227547
patch for multimedia/openshot

Release Notes
https://www.openshot.org/blog/2021/08/25/new_openshot_release_260/

Since the development version was already in use, I don't think much will change :)

--web-backend default is now fixed to webkit because it does not have webengine in its dependencies.
